A Gentle Beginning

Kidence Band

A quiet companion for life's gentle unfolding. Crafted for comfort, designed for connection.

Know their day,
even when you're not there.

The privacy-first AI wearable for toddlers—turning daily signals into a calm, parent-friendly digest. Data isn't the goal—understanding is.

Acoustic Intelligence

Distinguish between whimpers and screaming. Processed locally, never recorded.

Sleep Quality

Understand nap depth and disturbances to optimize their routine.

Emotional Pulse

Translate heartbeats into emotional clarity. Know the "why".

Thermal Baseline

Continuous, subtle skin temperature monitoring for constant comfort.

Embrace Your Rhythm

Thoughtful engineering meets elegant aesthetics to create a device that feels like a natural extension of your child.

Skin Friendly

Hypoallergenic materials designed for sensitive skin, ensuring zero irritation even during active play.

Soft Matte Finish

A sophisticated finish that is pleasing to the eye and silky to the touch, resisting fingerprints and dirt.

Durable Design

Engineered to withstand the rigors of childhood while maintaining its elegant, premium silhouette.
